headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Regency Centers, Raises Price Target to $81
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Regency Centers (NASDAQ:REG) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $80 to $81.
